title: Better Skyblock Drops
description: Plugin  |  Some mobs are dropping items needed for Skyblock progression!
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
# BETTER SKYBLOCK DROPS
Our plugin is also available on **[Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/better-skyblock-drops.100746/)** and **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/better-skyblock-drops)**!


We all love **Skyblock**! And we love playing with friends! Thanks to this plugin, your server can have these special drops to help you progress!

Our plugin is highly customizable, you can change your drop amounts and percentages with **config.yml** that is automatically created in your plugins folder! You can also fully **enable/disable** specific drops or events!

# LIST OF DROPS:
![Gravel and Glowstone Dust drops (both 10% for 1)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08803f226c60d440e8e2f6f2395a483a7691a5be_0.webp)
![Sand and Magma Cream drops (both 10% for 1)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a022b045b7e15277517398711c9ecfac65fcb8c_0.webp)
![Soul Sand and Guartz drops (both 10% for 1)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/202d4a5eda81f50443467ec616518a1f8031af2f.png)
![Ancient Debris (100% for 4)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c41cb017ccfef8f643d44ff074837b05852b2f9_0.webp)
